verdict: Retargeting campaign is bleeding budget with broken purchase tracking and dismal return this period.
diagnosis: Spend is running with almost no purchase tracking — only 28 in purchase value against thousands in spend this period.

signals.headline: Cost per purchase hit $288 this period
signals.detail: Average cost to drive one purchase sits at $288, with the latest data point at $192. Far above category norms for meat.

signals.headline: Only 26 add-to-carts in 28 days
signals.detail: Retargeting ads generated just 26 add-to-carts and 2 checkouts started. Mid-funnel is barely moving despite active spend.

signals.headline: 1,221 landing page views, 26 carts
signals.detail: Roughly 2% of landing page viewers add to cart. Product page or offer is not converting warm Instagram traffic.

signals.headline: 601 reviews, 0 new this period
signals.detail: Google profile shows 601 lifetime reviews but zero collected in the last 28 days. Local trust signal is going stale.

signals.headline: Instagram engagement up to 434 latest
signals.detail: Organic post engagement jumped to 434 in the latest period versus a 262 average. One creative direction is clearly resonating.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.subheader: Food and beverage converts highest of any vertical
benchmark.body: Food and beverage leads ecommerce verticals at around 6.22% visitor-to-order, while the all-store median is closer to 1.4%. DTC food customer acquisition cost typically runs $45 to $53.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.subheader: Subscription meat demand strong heading into summer
seasonal.body: Grocery delivery spending in the US is projected at $363.8 billion in 2026, and roughly 40% of consumers have tried subscription or on-demand food. Grilling season favors box bundles.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.body: Subscription box meat brands lean on monthly curated boxes, loyalty perks, and authentic sourcing stories. Ethnic and halal-specialty meat is a fast-growing niche, with ethnic food projected at 7.43% annual growth.

recommendations.title: Audit purchase tracking before spending another dollar
recommendations.detail: Purchase value shows only $28 against heavy spend. Verify the Meta pixel, conversions API, and Shopify event mapping. Numbers cannot be trusted until this is fixed.

recommendations.title: Test a bundle offer to lift cart rate
recommendations.detail: Only 26 add-to-carts from 1,221 page views this period. Consider a grill-season bundle or a free-shipping threshold to push warm retargeting traffic over the line.

recommendations.title: Restart review collection on Google profile
recommendations.detail: Zero new reviews this period despite 601 lifetime. Worth testing a post-delivery email or SMS asking happy customers to leave a Google review.
